ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "lad19cd" TEXT /* LAD19CD code for the location */,
  "tactical_cell" TEXT /* Tactical cell the location belongs to */,
  "location_type" INTEGER /* Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_type FOREIGN KEY ("location_type") REFERENCES location_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_tactical_cell FOREIGN KEY ("tactical_cell") REFERENCES tactical_cells ("cell_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tactical_cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tactical cell */,
  "cell_name" TEXT /* Name of the tactical cell */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tactical cell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tactical cell was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tactical cell was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_supply" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource supply entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the resource is supplied to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., water, electricity) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource supplied */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource quantity (e.g., liters, kilowatt-hours) */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource supply entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource supply entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_supply_resource_type FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_supply_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the score belongs to */,
  "brc_score" INTEGER /* BRC score for the location */,
  "vol_supply" INTEGER /* Volatility of supply for the location */,
  "worst_score" INTEGER /* Worst score for the location */,
  "best_score" INTEGER /* Best score for the location */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Mean score for the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical score entry */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score the history belongs to */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was recorded */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score at the time of recording */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical score entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical score entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the location */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the location was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_relationships" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location relationship */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "related_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related location */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., adjacent, contains) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_relationships_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_relationships_related_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
